name: Jade Fire Kraken
description: Jade Fire Kraken is a jade counterpart of Fire Kraken in Skylanders: Swap Force.
biography: Raised on a small island surrounded by a vast ocean of fire, Fire Kraken was the swiftest, most agile warrior his tribe had ever seen. And when a fleet of Fire Troll ships arrived to steal the legendary Burning Heart, a huge elemental crystal that fueled the fiery seas, Fire Kraken leapt into action. Using a magical staff to control his natural ability to wield fire, he set the mighty ships ablaze, forcing the trolls into a hasty retreat. Having saved the Burning Heart as well as his homeland, Fire Kraken soon joined the Skylanders, where he knew his skills would help those in need.

story.content: Raised on a small island surrounded by a vast ocean of fire, Fire Kraken was the swiftest, most agile warrior his tribe had ever seen. And when a fleet of Fire Troll ships arrived to steal the legendary Burning Heart, a huge elemental crystal that fueled the fiery seas, Fire Kraken leapt into action. Using a magical staff to control his natural ability to wield fire, he set the mighty ships ablaze, forcing the trolls into a hasty retreat. Having saved the Burning Heart as well as his homeland, Fire Kraken soon joined the Skylanders, where he knew his skills would help those in need.

trivia: He is the second Jade variant Skylander (the first is Jade Flashwing).
They are also both counterparts of dragons who didn't appear in Spyro's Adventure.
The fact that only dragon Skylanders have Jade counterparts may be a reference to Jade Dragons, carved statues made from the mineral from certain places in China.
This is particularly fitting for Fire Kraken, as he is based on both Chinese dragons and fireworks, which were Invented in China.
Like Slam Bam and Phantom Cynder, Jade Fire Kraken's body is translucent.
Unlike Jade Flashwing, Jade Fire Kraken is not exclusive to Target.

trailers.name: Meet the Skylanders Jade Fire Kraken
